theScene: The first few hours of your shift are uneventful, and you quickly fall into a routine of fetching ingredients, passing food, filling glasses, and chatting with the occasional patron while Belle handles most of the bartending work proper. So far, you haven't been the object of any solicitations, and haven't had to deal with anything lewder than a lecherous quip or teasing grope. It looks like it's going to be a quiet night...

... Or so you thought, but while your back is turned away from the bar as you fill a mug of beer for an already tipsy Lizard Girl, you suddenly feel something strong tug away at your work uniform while a chipper voice rings out above you.

Startled, you jump and turn towards the source of the voice, nearly dropping the freshly poured drink in the process, and find yourself face to talon with a flapping Harpy who stares at you excitedly as she awaits your response, prompting you to answer a bit awkwardly.
Great! You're coming with me, then!

She exclaims decisively while again pulling at your shirt with her talon. Unsure, you turn to Belle who just gives you an amused smile as she waves you off, and thus having her blessing, you slide the filled mug to the slouching Lizard woman who slurs a thank you, leaving you free to hurry and walk after your client before she ends up dragging you away in her overeager haste.

Seeing that you're coming, the Harpy whoops and flies gracefully through the room directly to the upper floor, requiring you to hasten your pace to catch up with her up the stairs where she awaits you, humming giddily to herself next to an already opened room and greeting you with a happy cheer.
This is going to be so much fun!
After which she immediately zips into the vacant room with a flutter of feathered wings...

Still somewhat puzzled, you follow her within and find her animatedly flying around, looking at the furniture with keen interest, finally providing you with an opportunity to ask after closing the door behind you.
So... What is it you want me to do, actually?
Freezing at your query, she lets out a shy chuckle as she perches on one of the big bed's wooden posts, sheepishly tapping her wings together.
Ha ha... Right. I guess I should have started with that?
She recovers swiftly from her embarrassment, however, a dazzlingly cheerful smile returning to her face as she exclaims.
I want you to cuddle with me!

I {b}looove{/b} to cuddle, but we always cuddle in piles back at the village, and I wanted something more... personal? And I thought I'd like to try with a human, for once? But whenever I tried approaching one at the Mountain, they'd think I was attacking them and we'd always end up having sex, or another Harpy would swoop in and we'd {i}also{/i} end up having sex... So... yeah.
{b}Oh!{/b} Or we could play, too, if you don't feel like cuddling?
As she speaks, she produces a melon-sized leather ball and plops it in her lap, eagerly awaiting your response.
Dizzy from her avalanche of rapid-fire words, you blink, open your mouth, and after a few seconds of confused silence, you prompt.
You know this is a brothel, right?
But you can hire people for other stuff than sex, right? I mean... if that's okay with you?
Deflating before your perplexity, she hugs her ball and stares at you expectantly, her taloned feet tapping on the wooden bedpost as she nervously shuffles in place.
Actually, I'm not interested in cuddling or playing.

Beaming, she absentmindedly discards the ball in her wings, letting it thump away while she hurriedly lifts the bed's covers and buries herself underneath, rambunctiously rolling this way and that as she enjoys the bed's softness, making it look like it's been invaded by some manner of burrowing creature as her muffled voice comments.
Then her slightly disheveled head pops back out and she treats you once more to a radiant grin, scooting onto one pillow to pat the other invitingly.

Enjoined by her infectious enthusiasm, you walk up to the bed and take your place beneath the sheets, the Harpy squeeing happily as you do so, and immediately glomping you as soon as you've comfortably lied down, excitedly squeezing you and affectionately rubbing her head against your chest.

With her literally vibrating in glee, you wonder if she's actually going to be able to settle down enough for cuddling, but after an extra minute or two of giddy squirming and rambling, it seems she's gotten it out of her system and calms down with a long sigh, still languidly nuzzling you with a big smile on her face.
Thank you for taking the request. I know it was a bit... odd?

She giggles nervously, but the awkward sound switches to a joyful hum when you reassure her and pat her head, making her redouble the strength of her embrace in response... Though thankfully, as thin as she is, even the tight hug doesn't prove painful, instead lavishing you with the pleasant softness of her feathered limbs.

With her liking it as much as she clearly does, you continue to pat her while relaxing into the comfy mattress, letting out a breath of relief that carries your bedfellow's warm, slightly cinnamony scent into your nose, further contributing to draining your stress and tension away.

In fact, you're enjoying this more than you might have thought you would, the work at the bar, the constant noise, the heavy smells, and the rowdy patrons having tired you out more than you realized, making the prospect of a cuddlenap more tempting by the second...

Judging by the Harpy's lowering eyelids and slowing breathing, the same goes for her, the touchy-feely monster girl wrapping her downy legs around yours as she sticks even closer to you, querying with a demureness that feels almost out of place from a Harpy.
... Do you mind if we have a nap?

Feeling like chuckling at how you've both so quickly reached the same conclusion, you tell her that you certainly don't, to which she answers with a drowsy happy murmur as she settles comfortably on your chest and closes her eyes, a content smile plastered all over her cute features.

Finding it harder and harder to resist the lure of sleep yourself, and seeing in fact no reason to, you lazily let your eyelids drop as well, lulled by the bed's luxuriousness, the Harpy's warm presence, and the hushed rumble of the inn whose hustle and bustle feels so distant as you drift off...

You're startled awake somewhat unpleasantly by an overly vigorous patron slamming the door behind them as they leave the room next to yours, the culprit's nature becoming quite apparent when the tromping of descending hooves echoes up the stairs, rousing you for good alongside your nightly companion whose eyes flutter blearily.
Yawning prodigiously, the Harpy looks around in slight confusion until her clouded stare rests on you, her expression immediately lighting up.
Amused by her reaction, you greet her back, and she gives you a cozy wake-up nuzzle before sighing.
Well, it's morning, so I guess that's it.
Reluctantly, she lets go of you, then energetically swings her legs off the bed, yawning again and hastily smoothing out her hair and plumage before putting her hat back on, then turning to you.
Oh, shoot, I almost forgot! I gotta pay you, right?
Hurriedly rummaging through her belongings, she bites her lip, rummages a bit more, and ultimately presents you with a Rune.
Errrr... I actually don't have a lot of money on me... But payment in kind's fine, right?

Taking a look at the magic item, you can quickly see that it would easily fetch 250 Eros, which does seem reasonable for the kind of service you've been asked to offer. Confident that it won't be a problem for Belle, you respond affirmatively, the Harpy breathing out in relief as she puts the object in your hand.
Phew. That would have been awkward...

On an impulse, she then walks up to you and wraps you up in a feathery hug that you can't but return, the cheerful monster girl giggling happily at your embrace before pulling away and offering you a more restrained, companionable nod.

With that taken care of, she recovers her previously dropped ball, flaps to the door, opens it, and waves you a feathery goodbye before flying away... which leaves you with nothing else to do but take some time to rearrange your clothes, then walk out in turn to get started with your day.

However, as you reach the Goddess' Embrace's common room, you realize that something feels off. The few morning patrons are giving you insistent stares, and even the normally gruff Belle is looking oddly... jovial?
So, [ThePlayerName], according to that girl, you're 'The best human she's ever slept with!'?
... It seems there's been a misunderstanding. Which only gets worse as the clientele chimes in.
Apparently, you're 'the biggest she ever had'!
And you gave it to her the whole nyaght!?

Befuddled by how much your customer's innocent words got distorted, you stand there in confused silence while the locals offer you words and nods of praise, one adventurer even slapping you congratulatorily on the back while a succubus studies you with a lidded, hungry stare...

You're not sure whether it would be more embarrassing to go along with the misunderstanding or to dispel it, but it actually seems like doing neither might be the best option, Belle quickly returning to her usual sternness while the patrons change topics or get on with their days.
Still, as you return to the inn's foyer, you can't help but feel like there are going to be a few extra rumors about you around the Town...

Taking you by surprise, she tosses you her ball, which you catch half with your hands, half with your stomach, giving the guileless Harpy a slightly peeved look for her sucker throw before sending it back to her, the nimble monster girl having no trouble agilely nabbing it midair in her talons. Giggling, she flaps up as much as the room's ceiling allows her to, and ponders for a moment before offering.

How about we play Thumpwall? It's a pretty simple game: we both face a wall and we take turns swatting the ball at it with our wing... err... or hand. If you use your feet or any other part of your body, or if you miss the ball, or if you grab it, the other person gets a point... You gotta be a good sport, though: the ball has to bounce back {i}towards{/i} the other player, not {i}away{/i}. Otherwise, the point goes to them. Got it?
Finding the rules straightforward enough, and seeing no reason not to humor her, you nod affirmatively, then go position yourself next to your opponent, who hefts the ball.
And so the game is on!

The first few minutes are somewhat awkward, the Harpy having a clear advantage due to her wealth of experience with the game, especially compared to a neophyte like you. However, speaking of being a good sport, she's perceptibly making a deliberate effort to go easy on you, doing slow throws on purpose so that you have ample time to recover and can get used to the pace.

Once you've settled into the groove, however, the gloves start coming off, and the friendly session begins feeling more like an actual match, the ball moving faster and faster as your swats become more and more confident and powerful!

Soon, the room fills with the loud thumps of the bouncing ball and with your cries of effort, triumph, or dismay, your voice and the Harpy's mixing to form quite the noisy chorus. Points are accrued on both sides, and you have the satisfaction of proving quite the worthy opponent, not giving much ground against your adversary despite her superior familiarity and mobility!
You're both getting quite into the game, when suddenly, your play is interrupted by a loud bang on the other side of the wall!

Taken by surprise by the irruption, you catch the ball, you and the Harpy apparently equally mortified to have failed to realize how much of a ruckus you were making. Shamefully, you look at each other while in the sudden silence, you hear another voice from the same room as the first one.
{i}But damn, he was really giving it to her good, huh?{/i}

This time, you both snort, having to make an effort to keep yourselves from bursting into laughter at the comedic misunderstanding, the abrupt stop in your activity also incidentally making you realize how sweaty and winded you are from all the fast-paced moving and hitting.

Shamelessly, you stagger to the bed and unceremoniously drop on it, soon joined by your valiant opponent, the two of you taking a few minutes to catch your breath and enjoy the comfort of the mattress.
That was fun!♪ ... But we should probably switch to something more... quiet, right?

You can't but agree, having no desire to see the intimidating Belle get involved. After trading suggestions, you settle for showing each other ball tricks and having some less heated competition with them, performing figures, balancing the ball on different parts of your body, and partaking in other legerdemain-like maneuvers...
And so time passes until the Harpy takes a glance at the room's window and sighs.
Ah... I should probably get going. It's been a few hours already, after all...

Seeing her downcast expression, you give her a few comforting pats, assuring her that whenever you're both around, you can do this again, which seems to cheer her up and prompts her to give you an energetic hug.
And with that, you give her back her ball, and she gets to the window, opens it, and turns to you.
Without further ado, she flies away towards the Mountain, the flapping of her wings and her happy humming lingering in the air for a moment... Then she's gone for good.
... And forgot to pay you, you realize.

Looking through the window, you can see that the fast-moving monster girl is already but a small shape in the sky, and so you sigh, willing to make peace with the fact that you won't get any money out of this, but reflecting that you {i}did{/i} have fun, which makes it feel not so bad to walk out of it empty-handed.

... Or so you think, until you notice that in the course of your Thumpwall match, the Harpy lost a handful of her feathers, including some especially big and fluffy ones which should fetch a decent price...

Pocketing your 'payment', you walk out of the room, stretching and rolling your muscles to prevent them from cramping. Ever since you've reached Lucidia, you've gotten somewhat unused to that kind of exercise, and it actually feels good to get a rousing, non-lewd workout every once in a while... It might even be useful in the kind of 'combat' you regularly partake in?
... Probably not. But you do feel like you've learned something.

EventText.NameOfScene: Actually, I'm not interested in cuddling or playing.
theScene: The Harpy's smile melts into a crestfallen pout, and she nods despondently.
Oh, okay... Sorry for having bothered you, then...
Discomfited, she alights from the bed and flaps out of the room to look for another companion... or perhaps call it a night altogether.
As for you, you leave the room as well, and with nothing else to do now, you return to the bar to finish your shift.
Belle gives you a quizzical look when you get there, but offers no comment, letting you carry on with your bartending duties.
The rest of the night proceeds with no further incidents, and after a few more hours, Belle hands you your pay.
It seems like your unsuccessful Harpy customer provided a little extra as an apology for your trouble.
